patch.value: CodeFactor/Complexity: cut cyclomatic-complexity debt across the extension authoring, management & diagnostics surface

Behavior-preserving cyclomatic-complexity reduction for the highest-CC builder/transformer/renderer functions on the extension + package authoring/management/diagnostics surface, pruning their entries from eslint-suppressions.json (the CodeFactor 'Complex Method' baseline) toward the A+ goal (epic pm-92if).

Targets (ESLint complexity max 17 == CodeFactor CC>=18 'Complex Method'):
1. src/cli/commands/extension/managed-state.ts normalizeManagedState (CC 43) — extract source/record normalizers + optionalString helper + type-predicate field guard.
2. src/cli/commands/extension/bundled-catalog.ts buildBundledPackageCatalog (CC 31) — extract per-package entry builder + catalog links builder.
3. src/cli/commands/extension/doctor.ts buildExtensionTriageSummary (CC 29) — replace the prefix->remediation if-ladder with a data-driven remediation rule table.
4. src/core/extensions/activation-summary-markdown.ts renderExtensionSurfaceMarkdown (CC 19) — extract preflight section + compute hasAnySurface via .some.
5. src/cli/commands/extension/scaffold.ts buildStarterExtensionScaffoldFiles (CC 37) — split package vs extension-only file builders + extract README define-builder snippet builder.

Strategy (per pm-arzz): extract helpers, guard clauses, replace if/switch ladders with lookup tables/dispatch maps. Behavior-preserving only; keep 100/100/100/100 coverage; new helpers covered by existing tests (no dead defensive branches); respect static-quality-gate 120-files/dir cap (keep helpers in-file, no new dirs). Output of scaffold/catalog/markdown must stay byte-identical (snapshot/string tests).

Author-time SDK contract files (compose.ts lintExtensionBlueprint CC 26, sdk/cli-contracts tool-schema buildActionScopedToolSchema CC 23, flag-contracts resolveSubcommandFlagContractsForCommand CC 87) and dangerous core dispatch (loader parseManifest CC 75, extension runExtension CC 104) are OUT OF SCOPE here — tracked separately.

Implemented all 5 behavior-preserving refactors. managed-state normalizeManagedState CC43->~7 (optionalString + hasRequiredManagedRecordFields type-guard + normalizeManagedSource/Record). activation-summary-markdown renderExtensionSurfaceMarkdown CC19->~14 (renderPreflightSection + hasAnySurface via .some). bundled-catalog buildBundledPackageCatalog CC31->~4 (buildBundledCatalogLinks + buildBundledCatalogPackageEntry). doctor buildExtensionTriageSummary CC29->~7 (TRIAGE_REMEDIATION_RULES data table + buildExtensionTriageRemediation). scaffold buildStarterExtensionScaffoldFiles CC37->~9 (buildScaffoldSnippetNames + buildDefineBuilderImports/Exports/Activate); scaffold output verified BYTE-IDENTICAL across 10 caps x 2 vocabularies x declarative via snapshot diff. Pruned all 5 entries from eslint-suppressions.json (84->79). typecheck + full eslint green. Added 2 normalizeManagedState test cases (null/non-object source on otherwise-valid record) for the newly-isolated normalizeManagedSource guard.

Completed: 5 behavior-preserving complexity refactors on the extension authoring/management/diagnostics surface; CC 43/37/31/29/19 all reduced below 17; 5 eslint-suppressions pruned; 100% coverage; scaffold byte-identical.
